PositionBound positionBound,\n                                    final QueryConfig config) {\n\n        return StoreQueryUtils.handleBasicQueries(\n            query,\n            positionBound,\n            config,\n            this,\n            position,\n            context\n        );\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public synchronized byte[] get(final Bytes key) {\n        return map.get(key);\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public synchronized void put(final Bytes key, final byte[] value) {\n        putInternal(key, value);\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public synchronized byte[] putIfAbsent(final Bytes key, final byte[] value) {\n        final byte[] originalValue = get(key);\n        if (originalValue == null) {\n            put(key, value);\n        }\n        return originalValue;\n    }\n\n    // the unlocked implementation of put method, to avoid multiple lock/unlock cost in `putAll` method\n    private void putInternal(final Bytes key, final byte[] value) {\n        synchronized (position) {\n            if (value == null) {\n                map.remove(key);\n            } else {\n                map.put(key, value);\n            }\n\n            StoreQueryUtils.updatePosition(position, context);\n        }\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public synchronized void putAll(final List<KeyValue<Bytes, byte[]>> entries) {\n        for (final KeyValue<Bytes, byte[]> entry : entries) {\n            putInternal(entry.key, entry.value);\n        }\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public synchronized <PS extends Serializer<P>, P> KeyValueIterator<Bytes, byte[]> prefixScan(final P prefix, final PS prefixKeySerializer) {\n\n        final Bytes from = Bytes.wrap(prefixKeySerializer.serialize(null, prefix));\n        final Bytes to = Bytes.increment(from);\n\n        return new InMemoryKeyValueIterator(map.subMap(from, true, to, false).keySet(), true);\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public synchronized byte[] delete(final Bytes key) {\n        return map.remove(key);\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public synchronized KeyValueIterator<Bytes, byte[]> range(final Bytes from, final Bytes to) {\n        return range(from, to, true);\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public synchronized KeyValueIterator<Bytes, byte[]> reverseRange(final Bytes from, final Bytes to) {\n        return range(from, to, false);\n    }\n\n    private KeyValueIterator<Bytes, byte[]> range(final Bytes from, final Bytes to, final boolean forward) {\n        if (from == null && to == null) {\n            return getKeyValueIterator(map.keySet(), forward);\n        } else if (from == null) {\n            return getKeyValueIterator(map.headMap(to, true).keySet(), forward);\n        } else if (to == null) {\n            return getKeyValueIterator(map.tailMap(from, true).keySet(), forward);\n        } else if (from.compareTo(to) > 0) {\n            LOG.warn(\"Returning empty iterator for fetch with invalid key range: from > to. \" +\n                    \"This may be due to range arguments set in the wrong order, \" +\n                    \"or serdes that don't preserve ordering when lexicographically comparing the serialized bytes. \" +\n                    \"Note that the built-in numerical serdes do not follow this for negative numbers\");\n            return KeyValueIterators.emptyIterator();\n        } else {\n            return getKeyValueIterator(map.subMap(from, true, to, true).keySet(), forward);\n        }\n    }\n\n    private KeyValueIterator<Bytes, byte[]> getKeyValueIterator(final Set<Bytes> rangeSet, final boolean forward) {\n        return new InMemoryKeyValueIterator(rangeSet, forward);\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public synchronized KeyValueIterator<Bytes, byte[]> all() {\n        return range(null, null);\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public synchronized KeyValueIterator<Bytes, byte[]> reverseAll() {\n        return new InMemoryKeyValueIterator(map.keySet(), false);\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public long approximateNumEntries() {\n        return map.size();\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public void commit(final Map<TopicPartition, Long> changelogOffsets) {\n        // do-nothing since it is in-memory\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public void close() {\n        map.clear();\n        open = false;\n    }\n\n    private class InMemoryKeyValueIterator implements KeyValueIterator<Bytes, byte[]> {\n        private final Iterator<Bytes> iter;\n        private Bytes currentKey;\n        private Boolean iteratorOpen = true;\n\n        private InMemoryKeyValueIterator(final Set<Bytes> keySet, final boolean forward) {\n            if (forward) {\n                this.iter = new TreeSet<>(keySet).iterator();\n            } else {\n                this.iter = new TreeSet<>(keySet).descendingIterator();\n            }\n        }\n\n        @Override\n        public boolean hasNext() {\n            if (!iteratorOpen) {\n                throw new IllegalStateException(String.format(\"Iterator for store %s has already been closed.\", name));\n            }\n            if (currentKey != null) {\n                if (map.containsKey(currentKey)) {\n                    return true;\n                } else {\n                    currentKey = null;\n                    return hasNext();\n                }\n            }\n            if (!iter.hasNext()) {\n                return false;\n            }\n            currentKey = iter.next();\n            return hasNext();\n        }\n\n        @Override\n        public KeyValue<Bytes, byte[]> next() {\n            if (!hasNext()) {\n                throw new NoSuchElementException();\n            }\n            final KeyValue<Bytes, byte[]> ret = new KeyValue<>(currentKey, map.get(currentKey));\n            currentKey = null;\n            return ret;\n        }\n\n        @Override\n        public void close() {\n            iteratorOpen = false;\n        }\n\n        @Override\n        public Bytes peekNextKey() {\n            if (!hasNext()) {\n                throw new NoSuchElementException();\n            }\n            return currentKey;\n        }\n    }\n}\n","numLines":301,"startLine":1,"totalLines":301}}}

comparing the serialized bytes. \" +\n                    \"Note that the built-in numerical serdes do not follow this for negative numbers\");\n            return KeyValueIterators.emptyIterator();\n {"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01MAMRATHaNH1WKGDoY1gNW8","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_016TknUKnUDXo92tSQVppAv7","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/app/streams/src/test/java/org/apache/kafka/streams/state/internals/InMemoryKeyValueStoreDeadlockTest.java","content":"/*\n * Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more\n * contributor license agreements. limitations under the License.\n */\npackage org.apache.kafka.streams.state.internals;\n\nimport org.apache.kafka.common.serialization.Serdes;\nimport org.apache.kafka.common.utils.Bytes;\nimport org.apache.kafka.streams.query.KeyQuery;\nimport org.apache.kafka.streams.query.PositionBound;\nimport org.apache.kafka.streams.query.QueryConfig;\nimport org.apache.kafka.streams.state.KeyValueStore;\nimport org.apache.kafka.streams.state.KeyValueStoreTestDriver;\nimport org.apache.kafka.streams.state.Stores;\n\n/**\n * Fray test that exercises concurrent put() and query() on InMemoryKeyValueStore\n * to detect the deadlock caused by reversed lock ordering between\n * synchronized(this) and synchronized(position).\n */\npublic class InMemoryKeyValueStoreDeadlockTest {\n\n    public static void main(final String[] args) throws Exception {\n        final KeyValueStoreTestDriver<Bytes, byte[]> driver =\n            KeyValueStoreTestDriver.create(Bytes.class, byte[].class);\n\n        final KeyValueStore<Bytes, byte[]> store =\n            Stores.keyValueStoreBuilder(\n                Stores.inMemoryKeyValueStore(\"deadlock-test-store\"),\n                new Serdes.BytesSerde(),\n                new Serdes.ByteArraySerde()\n            ).withLoggingDisabled().build();\n\n        store.init(driver.context(), store);\n\n        final Bytes key = Bytes.wrap(\"key\".getBytes());\n        final byte[] value = \"value\".getBytes();\n\n        // Seed the store so queries can find data\n        store.put(key, value);\n\n        final Thread writer = new Thread(() -> {\n            for (int i = 0; i < 10; i++) {\n                store.put(key, value);\n            }\n        });\n\n        final Thread reader = new Thread(() -> {\n            final KeyQuery<Bytes, byte[]> keyQuery = KeyQuery.withKey(key);\n            final QueryConfig config = new QueryConfig(false);\n concurrent put() and query() on InMemoryKeyValueStore\n * to detect the deadlock caused by reversed lock ordering between\n * synchronized(this) and synchronized(position).\n */\npublic class InMemoryKeyValueStoreDeadlockTest {\n\n    public static void main(final String[] args) throws Exception {\n        final KeyValueStoreTestDriver<Bytes, byte[]> driver =\n            KeyValueStoreTestDriver.create(Bytes.class, byte[].class);\n\n        final KeyValueStore<Bytes, byte[]> store =\n            Stores.keyValueStoreBuilder(\n                Stores.inMemoryKeyValueStore(\"deadlock-test-store\"),\n                new Serdes.BytesSerde(),\n                new Serdes.ByteArraySerde()\n            ).withLoggingDisabled().build();\n\n        store.init(driver.context(), store);\n\n        final Bytes key = Bytes.wrap(\"key\".getBytes());\n        final byte[] value = \"value\".getBytes();\n\n        // Seed the store so queries can find data\n        store.put(key, value);\n\n        final Thread writer = new Thread(() -> {\n            for (int i = 0; i < 10; i++) {\n                store.put(key, value);\n            }\n        });\n\n        final Thread reader = new Thread(() -> {\n            final KeyQuery<Bytes, byte[]> keyQuery = KeyQuery.withKey(key);\n            final QueryConfig config = new QueryConfig(false);\n            for (int i = 0; i < 10; i++) {\n                store.query(keyQuery, PositionBound.unbounded(), config);\n            }\n        });\n\n        writer.start();\n        reader.start();\n\n        writer.join();\n        reader.join();\n\n        store.close();\n        driver.clear();\n    }\n}\n","structuredPatch":[],"originalFile":null}}
